summary: The primary benefit of PPSV-23 lies in its protection against severe encapsulated bacterial infections among patients with sickle cell disease who are at high risk due to splenic dysfunction. It reduces the incidence of life-threatening conditions like pneumonia and sepsis by targeting common pathogens including Streptococcus pneumoniae.
